title: Task Management Application
description: Built a PERN stack task management app with JWT authentication and full CRUD functionality, featuring an interactive dashboard with charts to track task progress. Integrated PostgreSQL (Supabase) and REST APIs to ensure secure data handling and smooth user experience.

title: Berry & Root Website
description: Built a responsive React.js application for Berry Root with monthly report analysis using Chart.js, providing data-driven insights through interactive visualizations and past billing records. Focused on clean UI, smooth navigation, and efficient data handling, deployed on Vercel for optimal performance.

title: AI Trip Planner
description: Developed an AI-powered trip planner integrating multiple APIs to generate personalized travel itineraries. Implemented features like real-time weather insights, map-based navigation, trip history, and downloadable plans for enhanced user experience.

title: Real-Time Emotion & Stress Detection System
description: Developed a Real-Time Emotion & Stress Detection System that analyzes facial expressions and voice input to detect human emotions and stress levels. The system uses deep learning models for real-time prediction and displays results through an interactive dashboard.
tags: Machine Learning: TensorFlow / Keras (CNN models for face emotion detection,MFCC for audio feature extraction)
